# CVAttachmentMode

**Enumeration**

The propagation modes of a Core Video buffer attachment.

## Declaration

```swift
enum CVAttachmentMode
```

## Overview

You set these attributes when adding attachments to a [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVBuffer] object.

## Constants

- **CVAttachmentMode.shouldNotPropagate**: Indicates to not propagate the attachment.
- **CVAttachmentMode.shouldPropagate**: Indicates to copy the attachment.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Data types

- **CVBuffer**: A reference to a Core Video buffer.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
